briefs.title: BC Railway Safety Rules Updated — Locomotive, Track, and Extreme Heat Standards Refreshed
briefs.summary: BC has updated the list of federal railway safety rules that operators in the province must follow. Effective January 15, 2026, three existing rules — covering train operations, locomotive inspections, and track safety — are replaced with newer versions, and a new rule on extreme heat and wildfire risk management is added to the required list.
briefs.action_required: Review the four updated/new railway rules and confirm your operations comply before January 15, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Railway Safety Adopted Provisions Regulation amendments take effect
